description: Section 01 — about. Big eyebrow + heading, lede paragraph, then a 3-column grid: day-job copy, client note, and an off-hours list with little SVG icon tiles.

name: CV About

test_data.client_text: Independent contractor with proper paperwork. Standard B2B invoicing, no weirdness. Comfortable across multiple time zones, async-friendly by default.
test_data.day_job_text: Bridging real business stuff with real engineering. Started in commerce, so I get why the deadline matters and why the invoice has to be right. Then I write the API.
test_data.heading: Builds things that don't fall over six months later.
test_data.lede: Ten-plus years of writing the kind of code you can come back to. Backend frameworks at the core, modern frontends on top, and for the last while: a serious push into AI — MCP servers, agent workflows, retrieval, the works.

off_items.text: Late-night side projects — me, the cursor, and one too many tabs open.
A quiet bar, a notebook, and the city outside the window.
Old sci-fi shows and arguing about which captain is best.
